evals.prompt: Run a task to add authentication to my-app project
evals.expected_output: Git worktree created, agent launched, progress monitored, PR created on completion
assertions: Agent process is launched with task description
Progress is polled at configured interval
PR is created on task completion
Worktree is cleaned up after PR creation

evals.expected_output: Table of active worktrees, agent processes, and their status
assertions: All registered projects from repo-registry.yaml are listed
Active worktrees are shown with branch names
